title: KS Enchantments
description: "KS Enchantments" completely overhaul the enchanting process and the vanilla survival experience by adding 41 brand new enchantments to the game and modify many base game enchants and mechanics related to the equipment and enchantments
body:
"KS Enchantments" completely overhaul the enchanting process and the vanilla survival experience by adding 41 brand new enchantments to the game and modify many base game enchants and mechanics :

Find new unique enchantments, duplicate enchanted books, collect every mob heads, and much more !

![ks enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1fe3c37257c9c7095337c99c96d52a14a1215a.png)

**New enchantments:**

Common enchantments, obtainable with the enchanting table :

- Bane of illagers (sword) : deal additionnal damages to illagers, witches, ravagers, villagers and zombie villagers | incompatible with other damage enchantments | max level: 5
- Berzerker (sword) : gain strength when you're attacked | max level: 3
- Butcher (axes) : Give 66% chance to drop a mob head when killed | incompatible with looting | max level: 1
- Great Walker (leggings) : allow you to walk half a block higher per level | max level: 3
- Harvesting (hoes) : Harvest fully grown crops around the crops you break | incompatible with overgrowth | max level: 3
- Hiker (boots) : Makes you move faster on dirt path blocks | max level: 3
- Imposing (chestplate/elytra/Horse & wolf armors) : makes you bigger | incompatible with Stealthy | max level: 3
- Kinetic protection (helmet) : protect you from damages caused by: hitting a wall while flying with elytras, falling blocs like anvil and pointed dripstone, mace smash, and lightning bolt | incompatible with other protection enchantments, max level: 4
- Lifesteal (sword) : give you some health back when damaging enemies | incompatible with venomous, withering and fire aspect | max level: 3
- Lightning Strike (bow and crossbow) : 34% chance per level to summon a lightning bolt when hitting an entity | max level: 3
- Magic Protection (armor) : protect you from damages from dragon breath, ender pearl teleportation, damaging potion effects, guardian beams, evoker fangs, wither skulls, conduit (hostile mob only), arrows of harming and sonic booms from wardens | incompatible with other protection enchantments, max level: 5
- Reach (tools and weapons) : makes you reach blocks and entity from further away | max level: 4
- Recycling (tools,weapons and armors) : when breaking, you will get back all of the main material to craft it back | incompatible with mending, solar, osmosis and lunar | max level: 1
- Revenge (chestplate) : give glowing to entities that hit you for 3s/level | max level: 4 ( suggested by "DylanLurol-nd4ln" on YouTube!)
- Scout (bow and crossbow) : you can shoot torches now | incompatible with other enchantments modifying the projectile, max level: 1
- Smelting (tools) : smelt blocks when you mine them | incompatible with fortune and silk touch | max level: 1
- Sniper (bow/crossbow) : boost your damages depending on how far away you are from your target | incompatible with power | max level: 5
- Stealthy (chestplate/elytra/Horse & wolf armors) : makes you smaller | incompatible with Imposing | max level: 3
- Swift Companion (saddles and harness) : make your mount go faster | max level: 3
- Taunt (shield) : hitting an entity with your shield will taunt nearby hostile mobs in a 16 blocks radius (unless they've been hit by another player) | max level: 1
- Venomous (sword) deals poison damages to your enemies | incompatible with lifesteal, withering and fire aspect | max level: 5
- Worker (tools) : give both efficiency and sharpness effects only a bit less powerful | incompatible with efficiency and sharpness | max level: 5


Uncommon enchantments, can only be found on loot or on books in the enchanting table:

- Osmosis (all items with durability) : Repair you equipment when exposed to water (block or rain) (around 1pt/level every 5 second) | incompatible with mending, recycling, solar and lunar | max level: 3
- Solar (all items with durability) : Repair you equipment when exposed to sunlight (around 1pt/level every 2.5 second) | incompatible with mending, recycling, osmosis and lunar | max level: 3
- Lunar (all items with durability) : Repair you equipment when exposed to moonlight (around 1pt/level every 1.7 second) | incompatible with mending, recycling, osmosis and solar | max level: 3



Rares enchantments, you won't find them in the enchanting table:

- Ender Charged (bow/crossbow) : allow you to fire a dragon breath | can be found in end city loot chests, incompatible with other enchantments modifying the projectile | max level: 1
- Ender Shot (bow and crossbow) : You can shoot enderpearls to travel further, faster | can be found in the end city and the stronghold's library chests, incompatible with other enchantments modifying the projectile | max level: 1
- Fire Charged (bow/crossbow) : allow you to fire firecharges | can be found in nether fortress and bastion loot chests, incompatible with other enchantments modifying the projectile | max level: 1
- Lava Walker (boots) : turns lava into basalt around you | can be found in nether fortress, bastion and ruined nether portal chests | max level: 1
- Overgrowth (hoes) : automatically replant crops when broken if you have the corresponding seed in your inventory | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books and from trading with villagers, incompatible with Harvesting | max level: 1
- Vitality (armor) : Gives you more health | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books and from trading with villagers | max level: 5
- Withering (swords) : Gives wither effect to your enemies | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books, incompatible with lifesteal, venomous and fire aspect | max level: 1
- Quick Maneuver (banners and horns) : Gives you and nearby players the speed effect | can be only found on books as level 1 enchantments at pillager outposts (guaranteed), incompatible with other maneuver enchantments | max level: 5
- Inspiring Maneuver (banners and horns) : Gives you and nearby players the regeneration effect | can be only found on books as level 1 enchantments at pillager outposts (guaranteed), incompatible with other maneuver enchantments | max level: 5
- Defensive Maneuver (banners and horns) : Gives you and nearby players the resistance effect | can be only found on books as level 1 enchantments at pillager outposts (guaranteed), incompatible with other maneuver enchantments | max level: 5
- Offensive Maneuver (banners and horns) : Gives you and nearby players the strength effect | can be only found on books as level 1 enchantments at pillager outposts (guaranteed), incompatible with other maneuver enchantments | max level: 5


Curses:

- Curse of Atilla (boots) : transform grass blocks beneath you into path blocks | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books | max level: 1
- Curse of Double Edge (sword/axes) : deals damages to yourself whenever you attack something | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books | max level: 3
- Curse of erosion (tools, weapons, and armors) : your stuff lose durability way faster | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books | max level: 3
- Curse of Ender Gravity (chestplate/elytra/Horse & wolf armors) : reduces the gravity that affects you | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books, incompatible with Curse of Nether Gravity | max level: 3
- Curse of Nether Gravity (chestplate/elytra/Horse & wolf armors) : increase the gravity that affects you | can be found on any loot chest with enchanted books, incompatible with Curse of Ender Gravity | max level: 3



**Changes to vanilla enchantments:**

- Explosion, fire and projectile protections can be upgraded to level 5 to make them more interesting
- Depth strider, soul speed, frost walker and feather falling can now be applied to horses armors
- Flame and punch can now be applied to crossbows
- Knockback and punch can go up to level 4
- Multishot can go up to level 3
- Wolf armors can now be enchanted with Unbreaking and mending
- Infested blocks can be mined with silk touch to obtain the infested block and not the regular block (this is replaced by smelting)


**Other changes:**

- Enchanted books can be duplicated in the crafting table when combined with 8 lapis

- banners can be worn on the head slot like a pillager raid captain

- swords can now be enchanted with Lunge, but will only trigger when hitting an entity

- Shields can now be enchanted with knockback

- Nautilus armors can now be enchanted with all protection enchantments, thorns, imposing, stealthy and vitality

- Every mob can now drop their head (including variant versions) with a base 2.5% chance, boosted to 5.5% with looting, 66% with butcher and 100% with charged creepers.

- You can now power an enchanting table with amethyst blocks, budding amethyst, Lapis blocks and chiseled bookshelves, in addition to the basic libraries.

- you can smelt infested block in a furnace into their regular variant

- The ressource pack allows to translate the enchantments names in french and in english, by default all the enchantments are in english.


If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !
